title: Boost AI context with hybrid search in Spanner
summary: Google Cloud Spanner introduces hybrid search combining full-text and vector search in multi-model queries to support AI-powered experiences and retrieval-augmented generation. The service integrates with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform for contextual, intelligent search applications.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session covers Spanner's hybrid search capability, which combines full-text search and vector search for contextual retrieval in AI applications. It demonstrates building RAG (retrieval augmented generation) applications on Spanner and integrating with the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform for multi-model search experiences. The pairing of keyword and semantic retrieval in a single database matters for grounding AI systems on operational data without a separate search layer.
